_comment: Default pre-flight checklist for the right rail. The skill uses these groups/items when the candidate has no specific preferences, then augments with candidate-specific items derived from the conversation (e.g. 'Practice Q4 out loud', a key phrase to rehearse, a panelist to review). data-key values must be unique across the whole document and stable (they are the localStorage keys). When you add or remove items, recount: the rail header 0/N, the FAB count, and each group's x/N must match the real totals. Phrasing maps placeholders like [INTERVIEWER], [COMPANY], [ROLE] to the actual inputs.

items.label: Reread the [COMPANY] job description
Skim this brief end to end; expand all answers once (press E)
Practice your opener out loud, keep it to ~60 seconds
Rehearse your two strongest STAR stories
Confirm your salary target number
Pick 2-3 questions to ask from section 05
Test audio and video 15 min before
Have this brief open or printed
Water on the desk
Phone on silent, notifications off
Notebook open for follow-ups
Take a breath, speak from confidence
Open with your 'why this role' framing
Lead with metrics and scope on operational answers
Tie one answer back to a published value or priority
Ask 2 or 3 prepared questions
Ask about timeline and next steps
Thank [INTERVIEWER], confirm availability
Send a thank-you note within 24 hours
Note what you learned about fit
Capture topics and gaps for the next round
